  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractShop
    A reusable, extensible base architecture for all shop-like interactables.
    ActionState
    Enumerates the possible activities a Sim can be performing at any moment.
    AdultStage
    Life stage for Sims aged 18–64.
    AsciiArt
    AsciiArt — utility class for one-off static art not tied to a Sim action or location.
    AsciiEngine
    The rendering engine responsible for selecting the correct ASCII art.
    BaseCommand
    Template Method Pattern base class for all player commands.
    Bed
    A bedroom interactable that puts the Sim to sleep, restoring energy and fast-forwarding the game clock to the next morning (08:00).
    BookshopShelf
    A bookshop selling knowledge-related items and entertainment.
    Building
    Abstract base class for all visitable locations in the game world.
    CareerManager
    Manages a Sim's employment state: current job, tier/promotion level, shift tracking, truancy detection, and daily resets.
    CharacterStatusCommand
    Command that displays a detailed status report of the active Sim.
    ChildStage
    Life stage for Sims aged 0–12.
    CommandContext
     
    CommandContext.Builder
     
    CommandResult
    Control-flow signal between commands and the engine.
    Commercial
    A shop building where Sims can browse and purchase items (e.g.
    Computer
    A utility interactable that allows a Sim to browse the web for fun, increasing happiness, or study for personal enjoyment.
    Consumable
    An item that can be eaten by a Sim, restoring hunger (satiation), energy, and happiness.
    Container
    Abstract component for any item that can hold other items.
    DefaultBuildingAsciiProvider
    DefaultBuildingAsciiProvider — 2D generic building for any location that doesn't have its own dedicated provider.
    EatingAsciiProvider
    EatingAsciiProvider — 2D side-view of a stickman Sim at a dining table.
    ElderStage
    Terminal life stage for Sims aged 65+.
    Energy
    Represents the Energy need of a Sim.
    Food
    A consumable food item that restores hunger and energy but provides no happiness bonus.
    Fridge
    A kitchen interactable that restores hunger when used.
    Furniture
    A placeable item that occupies space in a Room.
    GameConstants
    Global constants used throughout the Sims CLI game.
    GameEngine
    Core coordinator of the simulation game.
    GameLoop
    GameLoop — orchestrates per-tick and per-day processing for the simulation.
    GameRandom
    Utility class providing a single, global instance of Random to be used across the entire game for consistency and performance.
    Gender
    Represents the biological gender of a Sim, affecting marriage and reproduction mechanics.
    GroceryShelf
    A commercial interactable that sells Consumable items for Sims to purchase and place in their inventory.
    Happiness
    Represents the overarching Happiness metric for a Sim.
    HouseAsciiProvider
    HouseAsciiProvider — 2D front-view of a residential home.
    HouseInfoCommand
    Command that displays information about the current residential building.
    Hunger
    Represents the immediate dietary requirements of a Sim.
    Hygiene
    Represents the Hygiene component for the Sim.
    IAsciiProvider
    Contract that all ASCII art providers must implement to supply visual art for the terminal renderer.
    ICommand
    Contract that every player action must fulfill.
    IInputHandler
    Contract for the class that processes raw player input during the game loop.
    InputHandler
    Factory and dispatcher: maps raw user input to the right Command object.
    Interactable
    Contract for in-world objects that a Sim can interact with (e.g.
    InteractableFactory
    Factory that creates Interactable instances from a furniture name string.
    InteractCommand
     
    InventoryCommand
     
    InventoryManager
    Manages a Sim's item inventory with a configurable capacity limit.
    IRenderer
    Contract for rendering game state to the screen.
    ISimBehaviour
    Contract that every controllable/playable Sim type must fulfil.
    Item
    Abstract base class for all items that a Sim can own, buy, or interact with.
    IWorldManager
    Contract for the class responsible for managing world layout and the player's current location.
    Job
    Enumeration of all available careers in the simulation, each with salary, working hours, energy drain, age limits, promotion multiplier, and max tier.
    JobMarketCommand
    Command that opens the job market menu for the active Sim.
    LifecycleManager
    LifecycleManager — centralizes all daily aging, life-stage transitions, death-by-old-age, and retirement logic for every Sim in the neighborhood.
    LifeStage
    State Pattern interface for Sim lifecycle stages (Child, Teen, Adult, Elder).
    Main
    The main entry point for the Sims-CLI game.
    MainMenu
    Main menu controller — handles new game creation, loading, and deletion.
    MenuPagination
    Reusable paginated menu utility for displaying lists of Items.
    MenuPagination.MenuAction
    Callback interface for handling item selection.
    MoveRoomCommand
    Command that moves the active Sim between rooms inside a residential building.
    Need
    Abstract representation of a Sim's biological or emotional need.
    NPCManager
    Manages a persistent pool of NPC Sims that inhabit the world.
    NPCProvider
    Abstraction for classes that provide a pool of NPC Sims.
    NPCSim
    A non-playable character (NPC) Sim that inhabits the park.
    Park
    A public park building where Sims can socialize with NPCs.
    ParkBench
    Represents a park-bench interactable where the active Sim can socialize with NPC visitors.
    PlayingAsciiProvider
    PlayingAsciiProvider — 2D view of a stickman Sim running and playing.
    RandomEventManager
    Fires random events each tick with a small probability.
    Relationship
    Encapsulates the social connection between two Sims, tracking a numeric friendship score and a categorical RelationshipStatus.
    RelationshipManager
    Manages all social bonds, interactions, and romantic relationships for a single Sim.
    RelationshipStatus
    Enumerated thresholds detailing the severity and nature of an association between two Sims.
    Residential
    A home building comprising multiple Rooms, each containing furniture interactables.
    Room
    A subdivided area within a Residential building that holds furniture interactables (e.g.
    Savable
    Interface for objects that can be saved to and loaded from a string format.
    SaveManager
    Manages the persistence of game state, including saving worlds, loading worlds, and deleting existing game saves.
    Shower
    A bathroom interactable that fully restores a Sim's hygiene need at the cost of a small amount of time.
    Sim
    The core actor in the simulation — a virtual person with needs, a career, an inventory, relationships, and a lifecycle governed by the State Pattern.
    SimsNeedsTracker
    Centralised tracker for all five Sim needs (Hunger, Energy, Hygiene, Happiness, Social), health, and the resulting SimState.
    SimState
    Encapsulates the overall physical constraints and emotional states of a Sim.
    SimulationException
    Thrown when game rules block an action (e.g.
    SimulationLogger
    A central logger that domain objects can publish messages to.
    SleepEventException
    Specialised signal indicating that the Sim is going to sleep.
    SleepingAsciiProvider
    SleepingAsciiProvider — 2D side-view of a stickman Sim lying in a bed.
    Social
    Represents the Social isolation need of a Sim.
    SocialAction
    Represents the various social actions that a Sim can perform with another Sim.
    SocializingAsciiProvider
    SocializingAsciiProvider — 2D view of two stickman Sims talking face-to-face.
    SpouseInteractionCommand
    Command to interact with a spouse from anywhere if they are in the household.
    StorageChest
    A storage container placed in the world where a Sim can deposit Items from their personal inventory for later retrieval.
    StoreAsciiProvider
    StoreAsciiProvider — 2D front-view of a market/supermarket building.
    StudyingAsciiProvider
    StudyingAsciiProvider — 2D side-view of a stickman Sim reading at a desk.
    SwitchSimCommand
     
    TeenStage
    Life stage for Sims aged 13–17.
    TerminalRenderer
    Concrete implementation of IRenderer for terminal-based display.
    TimeManager
    Tracks the simulation clock — ticks, days, and time-of-day.
    Trait
    Personality traits randomly assigned to a Sim at creation.
    TravelCommand
     
    UIManager
    Centralised static utility for all user-facing output: screen clearing, hints, animations, prompts, warnings, and game-over stats.
    UpgradeRoomCommand
    Command that upgrades a room's capacity in the current residential building.
    WeightBench
    A piece of exercise equipment.
    WorkCommand
     
    WorkingAsciiProvider
    WorkingAsciiProvider — 2D side-view of a stickman Sim typing at a desk.
    WorkResult
    Immutable value object returned by Sim.performWork() containing the outcome of a work shift: success status, earnings, promotion flag, and overwork indicator.
    WorldManager
    Concrete implementation of IWorldManager.
